message:
🐛 Auto-stash uncommitted changes during updates instead of blocking (#2044)

- git pull now uses --autostash so developer channel updates succeed
  even with local changes
- Release channel updates stash/pop around git checkout
- Removed uncommitted changes as a blocking prereq in the UI
- Changed warning banner from "paused" to informational "will be stashed"
- Reset triggerGuardRef on done/failed so retry works without refresh

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -514,6 +514,7 @@
       "currentSHA": "Current Commit",
       "latestSHA": "Latest on main",
       "uncommittedWarning": "Uncommitted changes — auto-update paused",
+      "uncommittedAutoStash": "Local changes detected — they will be automatically stashed during updates and restored after",
       "agentRequired": "kc-agent required for auto-updates",
       "agentRequiredDesc": "Start kc-agent to enable automatic updates",
       "helmDisabled": "Auto-update not available for Helm installs",
